query: I made an app-launcher window in eww with an input field for the search box, but when it opens I literally cannot click into it or type anything — keystrokes do nothing. The input widget itself looks fine. What am I missing?
expected_behavior: Routes to INTERACTIVE.md (the input widget reference)
Diagnoses that the containing defwindow is missing :focusable "ondemand" — without it the input cannot receive keyboard focus
Shows the fix: add :focusable "ondemand" to the defwindow, not to the input widget
Does NOT chase the input's own props (value/onchange) since those are not the cause
notes: Guards against debugging the input widget's own properties when the real cause is window-level. The skill documents this as a CRITICAL callout: an input that won't accept keystrokes means the window lacks :focusable "ondemand". A naive answer would tweak :onchange or suggest a button, missing the window requirement entirely.
